OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Creates ApplicationForm and ApplicationFormRelation for grants intake.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: GrantsCreateApplicationFormAndRelation

omniProcessElements.name: CreateApplicationForm
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ApplicationFormName" : "%ApplicationFormName%", "ApplicationInformation" : "%ApplicationInformation%", "BusinessInformation" : "%BusinessInformation%", "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "FundingOpportunityId" : "%FundingOpportunityId%", "NormalizedFundingOpportunityId" : "%NormalizedFundingOpportunityId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "" : "" }, "bundle" : "GrantsCreateApplicationForm", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "OR(ISBLANK(%FundingOpportunityId%) != true, ISBLANK(%ContextId%) != true)", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction_CreateApplicationForm", "responseJSONNode" : "applicationFormId", "responseJSONPath" : "ApplicationForm_1:Id", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: CreateApplicationFormRelation
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ApplicationFormId" : "%applicationFormId%", "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "FundingOpportunityId" : "%FundingOpportunityId%", "NormalizedFundingOpportunityId" : "%NormalizedFundingOpportunityId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "" : "" }, "bundle" : "GrantsCreateApplicationFormRelation", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "OR(ISBLANK(%FundingOpportunityId%) != true, ISBLANK(%ContextId%) != true)", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction_CreateApplicationFormRelation", "responseJSONNode" : "applicationFormRelationId", "responseJSONPath" : "ApplicationFormRelation_1:Id", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: EnforceGrantmakingUsageType
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ApplicationFormId" : "%applicationFormId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "" : "" }, "bundle" : "GrantsUpdateApplicationFormUsageType", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(%applicationFormId%) != true", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction_EnforceGrantmakingUsageType", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: GetFundingOpportunityName
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "GrantsGetFundingOpportunityName", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "NormalizedFundingOpportunityId", "inputParam" : "FundingOpportunityId" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "OR(LEN(%NormalizedFundingOpportunityId%)=15, LEN(%NormalizedFundingOpportunityId%)=18)", "failOnStepError" : false, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "Get Funding Opportunity Name", "responseJSONNode" : "FundingOpportunity", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: Response
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "additionalOutput" : { "applicationFormDetails:applicationFormId" : "%applicationFormId%", "applicationFormDetails:applicationFormRelationId" : "%applicationFormRelationId%", "applicationFormDetails:errorMessage" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%NormalizedFundingOpportunityId%),\"Please select a Funding Opportunity before submitting.\",\"\")" }, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "ResponseAction1", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { } }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "currentLanguage" : "en_US", "description" : "", "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "labelPlural" : "", "labelSingular" : "", "linkToExternalObject" : "", "mockResponseMap" : { }, "nameColumn" : "", "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "rollbackOnError" : true, "trackingCustomData" : { }, "ttlMinutes" : 5 }
